name: @openclaw/mission-control-mcp
description: MCP server for OpenClaw Mission Control portfolio workflows.

scripts.api:export: UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache AUTH_MODE=local LOCAL_AUTH_TOKEN=ci-local-token-ci-local-token-ci-local-token-ci-local-token BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000 /bin/bash -lc 'cd ../../backend && uv run python scripts/export_openapi.py'
scripts.test: npm run api:gen && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node --test dist/tests/**/*.test.js
